questionHtml: On the diagram, draw lines to show the rays after they have refracted through the lens. Label the refracted red rays with the letter R and the refracted blue rays with the letter B.
markschemeHtml:
each incident ray shown splitting into two ✔

each pair symmetrically intersecting each other on principal axis ✔

for red, intersection further to the right ✔

For MP3, at least one of the rays must be labelled.

meta.title: On the diagram, draw lines to show the rays after they have refracted through the lens. Label the refracted red rays with the letter R and the refracted blue rays with the letter B
